note: Intra-query parallelism (--query-threads): scan ONE query across N rayon shards, merge per-shard top-C. Single-query p50 13.08 -> 2.99 ms at 8 threads (4.4x lower latency), recall identical (exact-equivalent merge). Sub-linear because the scan is bandwidth-bound (8 cores on one query saturate RAM) + merge/rerank overhead. Latency-vs-throughput trade: one request uses all cores, so NOT for throughput-bound serving (002) - for latency-optimized deployments.
